title: Droga's Tweaks
description: A small vanilla+ 'tweaks' mod, adding mostly small mobs such as crabs or scorpions and plants like hedges and dead trees.
body:
![Owl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eWloxtcM/images/bf1fd09c794e7dabc0592816119bc0e101637be8.png)

This is a small mod that brings things I'd like to see in vanilla to Minecraft


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
- Flint ore
- Blocks of flint
- Baton
- Dead trees
- Hedges
- Crabs
- Lobsters
- Scorpions
- Snails
- Owls
- Mice

</details>
